text:
📁 REGEN TRIBE KNOWLEDGE SYNTHESIS Successfully processed your Telegram export. Source: 5,630 messages (Sep 2023 → Mar 2026) Clusters: 10 domain areas Output: 920KB across 14 documents DOCUMENTS • MASTER_SYNTHESIS.md — 78KB — Complete index + domain overview • TECHNICAL_DEEP_DIVE.md — 42KB — AI runtimes, economics, infrastructure • STRATEGIC_OVERVIEW.md — 41KB — Community building & regeneration • ai_agent_runtime.md — 119KB — ZeroClaw, IronClaw, MeTTa, AtomSpace • community_frameworks.md — 57KB — RCOS, Alchemy, sociocracy, governance • narrative_culture.md — 46KB — Integral, mythology, consciousness • ecovillages.md — 48KB — Ecovillage research, biozones • economics_alternatives.md — 39KB — x402, time banks, mutual credit • energy_systems.md — 25KB — Solar, microgrids, thermal • operations.md — 40KB — Operation Oracle/Lattice, roadmaps • regen_economy.md — 19KB — Degrowth, Triffin paradox • general.md — 256KB — General conversations • climate_environment.md — 88KB — Remediation, superfund FILE LOCATION Saved locally: ~/workspace-genesis/telegram-syntheses/
Google Drive upload blocked — service account lacks delegation. Files available locally.
KEY INSIGHTS AI Agent Runtime (535 entries) • 8-layer architecture: MeTTa → AtomSpace → PLN → Rust → WASM → Credential Gateway → Channel Adapter → Deployment • No single project has >3 layers done well • S-tier: ZeroClaw (infrastructure standard) • F-tier: MeTTaClaw (ideas A+, deployment F) Community Frameworks (225 entries) • RCOS: 7-layer governance model • Alchemy: 10-section playbook • RN Framework: 5-spiral timeline Economics Alternatives (156 entries) • x402 protocol for machine payments • DestroySaaS cooperative model • Time banks for inflation survival • Pareto frontier: Practical trades, food production, healthcare Regen Economy (73 entries) • Deglobalization inevitable (30-year anomaly ending) • Triffin paradox: Reserve currency destroys domestic industry • Solutions: Local production, skills portability, time banks Narrative Culture (193 entries) • Integral as "critical mass event" • Regeneration as new mythology • Phoenix Protocol: Post-profiler activation
All documents deduplicated, MECE-clustered, with monthly clusters and author attribution.
